title: Smuggler cant
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Smuggler cant''' was the term for jargon spoken by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] to keep [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] and law enforcement groups from recognizing the nature of their activities.

{{Language-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
'''Smuggler cant''' seems to be inspired by Cockney Rhyming Slang which was used to Confuse the London Police to cover what the group was going to do. Illegal or Otherwise.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
